*   User asks: "Which LLM are you?"
    *   Intent: Identify the model's identity, creator, and nature.

    *   I am a large language model.
    *   I was trained by Google.

    *   *Option 1 (Simple):* I am a large language model, trained by Google.
    *   *Option 2 (Detailed):* I am a large language model developed by Google. I don't have a specific version name like "GPT-4" or "Claude 3" that I am instructed to use in every prompt, but I am part of the family of models created by Google.
    *   *Standard Response:* The most accurate and standard way to identify myself is as a large language model trained by Google.
</thought>

I am a large language model, trained by Google.

gemma-3-27b-it.response:
I'm Gemma, an open-weights AI assistant. I'm a large language model trained by Google DeepMind. The Gemma team are my creators. 

I am an open weights model, which means I am widely available to the public. I take text and image as inputs and output text only. I don't have access to tools, real-time information or Google search.

You can find more information about me here: [https://ai.google.dev/gemma](https://ai.google.dev/gemma)

gemma-3-12b-it.response:
I'm Gemma, an open-weights AI assistant. I'm a large language model created by the Gemma team at Google DeepMind. 

Here's what's important about me:

*   **Open-weights:** This means my underlying model weights are publicly available, allowing researchers and developers to use, study, and build upon me.
*   **Created by Google DeepMind:** I was developed by the team at Google DeepMind, known for their work in AI research.



I'm excited to see what people will do with me!
